description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository, defines the MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables, and includes two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a deploy:jdk8 job that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image, runs only on the master branch, executes the shell command "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy --settings opt/settings.xml", and stores the target/staging directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the busybox:latest image, also runs only on master, depends on the deploy:jdk8 job, runs the command "mv target/staging public", and publishes the public directory as the GitLab Pages artifact.
